3.doc: InputValue is a binding to a state, into which the frontend will put the user entered signature. This is the pointer a State.
3.name: InputValue

6.doc: ErrorText is shown instead of SupportingText, even if they are (today) independent
6.name: ErrorText

8.doc: Style to apply. Use TextFieldReduced in forms where many textfields cause too much visual noise and you need to reduce it. By default, the TextFieldOutlined is applied.
8.name: Style
